svg.title: LEGIS Bill Review Workflow v4
svg.desc: LEGIS workflow with corrected executive approval sequence: conditional approvers in parallel first, then COO, then Director.
svg.text: Step 1 — LAI creates & submits analysis record

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the bill analysis record fields in LEGIS')
sendPrompt('What happens when LAI submits the record?')

svg.text: Step 2 — APOC assigns stakeholders & parallel review begins

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does APOC assign at the start of Step 2?')
g.text: Each assignment defines a parallel path

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do SMEs contribute and approve in an Administration path?')
sendPrompt('Why does the Sr. Deputy approve last in the Admin path?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the Sr. Deputy acts as the SME?')
sendPrompt('How does the standalone bureau or division path work?')
sendPrompt('What happens once all parallel paths are complete?')
sendPrompt('What does LAI review at this stage?')
sendPrompt('Who are the executive approvers added at this stage?')
g.text: COO, Director, Proxies; CAO/HSD/CME if needed

svg.text: Step 4 — LAI approval & executive approval chain
Record locked — read-only for all except COO, Director, CAO, HSD, CME

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does LAI approval do to the record?')

svg.text: If required — CAO, HSD, CME approve in parallel (before COO)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Can a proxy approver act on behalf of the COO?')
sendPrompt('What does the Director approval finalize?')
sendPrompt('What does the Email Artifacts button do in LEGIS?')
sendPrompt('What is included in the final artifact distribution?')
